zh.lifeSummary: 當Bartholomew Giffard於大約1228年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親William Giffard38歲，母親Alice Frebody35歲。他於1259年與Joan de Halsbury在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1314年在英國英格蘭戴文享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bartholomew Giffard于大约1228年出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲William Giffard38岁，母亲Alice Frebody35岁。他于1259年与Joan de Halsbury在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1314年在英国英格兰戴文享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Giffard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: (i) relationship name from the Continental Germanic personal name Gifard. (ii) nickname, perhaps sometimes from Old French giffard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Guiver
meanings: English: (i) nickname, apparently from Middle English giver ‘giver, donor, bestower’. (ii) variant of Giffard with voicing of /f/ to /v/ and loss of final -d.

variants.name: Gafford
meanings: English (southeastern): assimilated form of Gatford, a name of various origins. In Sussex and Surrey it is perhaps a variant of the habitational name Catford from a place so called in Somerset. Gatford is also from the habitational names Gateford (in Worksop, Nottinghamshire) or Gateforth (near Selby, Yorkshire), both formed with Old English gāt ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’, influenced by Old Norse geit ‘goat’.

Probably also an altered form of German Gaffert: habitational name from Gaffert near Köslin, Brandenburg, or from a personal name formed with Middle High German gate ‘fellow, companion’. The surname Gaffert is very rare in Germany.

English: perhaps an altered form of Gatewood , an occupational name for a ‘goatherd’ (Middle English gate-werde, Old English gātweard) or for a ‘gate keeper’ (Middle English gateward, Old English ʒeatweard, dialect gātward).

variants.name: Gifford
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

nameMeanings.name: Bartholomew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of New Testament origin, the name of an apostle mentioned in all the synoptic gospels (Matthew, Mark, and Luke) and in the Acts of the Apostles. It is an Aramaic formation meaning ‘son of Talmai’, and has been assumed by many scholars to be a byname of the apostle Nathaniel . Talmai is a Hebrew name, said to mean ‘abounding in furrows’ (Numbers 13:22).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Bartholomew Giffard was born about 1228, in Devon, England, his father, William Giffard, was 38 and his mother, Alice Frebody, was 35. He married Joan de Halsbury in 1259, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1314, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bartholomew Giffard est né environ 1228, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, William Giffard, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Alice Frebody, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Halsbury en 1259, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1314, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 87 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Bartholomew Giffardが約1228年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父William Giffardは38歳，母Alice Frebodyは35歳であった。1259年にイギリスデボンでJoan de Halsburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1314年にイギリスイギリスデボンで87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bartholomew Giffard(이)가 대략 1228년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Giffard(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Frebody(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1259년 영국 데폰에서 Joan de Halsbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1314년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bartholomew Giffard родился около 1228 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени William Giffard было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Frebody, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Halsbury в 1259 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1314 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 87 лет.

Se casó con Joan de Halsbury en 1259, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1314, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 87 años.
